high_level_findings_allowed_for_stage44: External evaluation remains incomplete due to severe NOT_ENTITLED collapse.
Stage43-C2 made the external composer path available.
Stage43-B1 must not be used for tuning, calibration, selection, loss design, model selection, or composer behavior changes.
stage43_summary.composer_path_status: Stage32/36/37/39 shadow fields are exported for all external rows and safe_structured_v2 is available for all external rows.

external_data_lock_policy.policy: Stage43-B1 remains external-evaluation-only and must not inform optimization, calibration, threshold tuning, checkpoint selection, model selection, loss design, composer behavior changes, or training templates.

allowed_internal_inputs: existing internal synthetic/controlled diagnostics as internal diagnostics only
existing Stage30/32/33/36/37/39/40/41/42 reports as historical internal reports
Stage43 high-level conclusion only: external evaluation remains incomplete due to severe NOT_ENTITLED collapse; composer path is now available; do not tune on external data
disallowed_external_uses: Stage43-B1 external labels for any design choice
Stage34/35 synthetic probes as naturalistic external validation

internal_hypotheses.text: NOT_ENTITLED over-prediction is caused by overly conservative final entitlement gating.
SUPPORT/REFUTE recall is under-protected during checkpoint selection.
Class-balanced CE or inverse-frequency loss alone may be insufficient because collapse happens through final entitlement gating, not only label imbalance.
safe_structured_v2 changes too few rows because its source shadow labels inherit the base collapse.
Improving internal SUPPORT/REFUTE recall must not increase unsafe SUPPORT.

candidate_options.name: Option A
candidate_options.title: Internal selection constraint
candidate_options.description: Add internal clean-dev selection constraints: minimum SUPPORT recall, minimum REFUTE recall, maximum NOT_ENTITLED prediction rate, and clean-dev accuracy tolerance while preserving macro-F1 as primary metric.

candidate_options.name: Option B
candidate_options.title: Entitled-class anti-collapse auxiliary loss
candidate_options.description: Add an internal auxiliary loss protecting SUPPORT/REFUTE entitlement separation using only controlled clean data labels and fields.

candidate_options.name: Option C
candidate_options.title: Final entitlement gate temperature/bias parameter
candidate_options.description: Learn or select a final entitlement gate temperature/bias parameter only on internal controlled train/dev data.

recommended_option.name: Option A
recommended_option.reason: It changes checkpoint selection only within internal clean-dev constraints, is easiest to audit for leakage, and directly tests whether SUPPORT/REFUTE recall is under-protected during selection.
recommended_option.fallback: If Option A fails, pre-register Option B as a separate internal-only training change.

constraints: support_recall >= pre-registered fixed floor or internal-baseline-derived floor
refute_recall >= pre-registered fixed floor or internal-baseline-derived floor
clean-dev accuracy degradation <= small pre-registered tolerance
unsafe SUPPORT counters on internal diagnostics do not increase beyond pre-registered tolerance
stage44b_selection_rule.baseline_rule: If historical internal baseline values are unavailable, Stage44-B must compute them on internal dev only and write them to a report before any model comparison.

stage44c_external_eval_rule.when: After Stage44-B selects a model/checkpoint using internal-only criteria.
stage44c_external_eval_rule.interpretation: Improvements are post-hoc external results, not training signals. Failures must be frozen honestly.

leakage_guardrails: No thresholds/calibration/checkpoints/model changes may be selected using Stage43-B1.
No Stage43-B1 examples may be used as training templates.
No Stage43-B1 labels, metrics, prediction distributions, or per-dataset outcomes may inform Stage44-B design choices.
Any future redesign after seeing Stage44-C external results must acquire a new external holdout or clearly label Stage43-B1 as no longer pristine.
allowed_claims: Stage44-A defines an internal-only redesign plan.
Stage44-B may use only internal controlled train/dev diagnostics.
disallowed_claims: Stage44 will fix VitaminC or Climate-FEVER.
Stage43-B1 can be used for tuning.

next_stage.recommended_path: Implement Option A: internal clean-dev constrained checkpoint selection audit.
next_stage.first_step: If internal baseline floors are unavailable, compute and freeze them from internal dev only before any model comparison.
